item.description:
ContentCam Nightly 20260723212002 is a native macOS camera studio for creating a clean, content-ready camera feed for OBS, meetings, streams, and vertical video. All camera processing stays on your Mac.
## Commits since previous Nightly `nightly-20260723210225`
- [`f238534`](https://github.com/jayb029/contentcam/commit/f23853415f677be32f2f1c43c00873d74f7e80b7) Fix Sparkle launch for ad-hoc releases - [`80eafc8`](https://github.com/jayb029/contentcam/commit/80eafc8d67505370c508c4705a73cd411571ac40) Bump build number to 20260723212002 [skip ci]
[View the full changelog](https://github.com/jayb029/contentcam/releases/tag/nightly-20260723212002)
